_schema_notes: Coordinates and hours sourced from live Google Maps listings on 2026-07-11. Google hours can lag reality — spot-check in person when convenient. hours: 24h 'HH:MM-HH:MM' per day, null = closed that day. Whole hours object null = hours unknown/unconfirmed. Closing past midnight: 02:00 am = '26:00', 03:00 am = '27:00'.

venues.name: Kong View
venues.short: Riverside-view restaurant and bar with live music
venues.description: Big open-air restaurant and bar on Souphanouvong Road with a view across the Mekong to Thailand. Known for live bands in the evening, Beerlao on tap and grilled food. Fills up with groups after sunset.

venues.name: Chokdee Café Belgian Beer Bar
venues.short: Belgian beer bar on the riverfront, big bottle list
venues.description: Belgian beer institution on the riverfront with one of the biggest bottle lists in Laos, regular 2-for-1 deals and pub food. Casual, popular with both locals and expats.

venues.name: Café Sinouk Khemkhong
venues.name_lo: ຄາເຟຊີນຸກ ເຂື່ອນຂອງ
venues.area: Quai Fa Ngum, opposite the night market
venues.short: Lao coffee house on the riverfront
venues.description: Riverside branch of the Lao coffee roaster, opposite the night market. Lao-grown beans, pastries and breakfast. Good daytime meeting spot before the riverfront wakes up.

venues.name: ITECC
venues.short: Mall and exhibition halls, hosts concerts and events
venues.description: Vientiane's main hall for concerts, fairs and big events. Check the event listing for dates — the building itself is a mall during the day.

venues.name: Go Dunk
venues.short: Temporarily closed after a fire — rebuilding bigger, back soon
venues.description: Vintage-garage bar-restaurant with burgers, pizza and nightly live music — temporarily closed after a fire, using the moment to rebuild wider and better. Follow their page for the reopening. It'll be a big night.

venues.name: Status Restaurant & Bar
venues.short: The late-night spot of the moment
venues.description: Restaurant-bar with music and a reservation culture — tables release around 8:30 pm, and booking ahead via their Facebook page is recommended on busy nights. Picked up the late-night crowd while its neighbour Go Dunk rebuilds — busy nights and recent upgrades of its own.

venues.name: Rustic White 90's Music Bar
venues.short: 90s music bar with live folk sets and DJ
venues.description: Music bar built around 90s hits, live folk sets and a DJ. Draws a young crowd — going early gets you a seat. Best with a group.

venues.name: Baron Vientiane
venues.short: Cocktail and DJ lounge, 90s and 2000s pop
venues.description: Upstairs cocktail lounge with DJ sets leaning 90s and 2000s pop. Dressier and pricier than the average Vientiane bar — bottle service for tables — with a big-city club feel. Closed Tuesdays, open late on weekends.

venues.name: Mahasan Music & Bar
venues.area: 2nd floor area above Starbucks, same building as Baron
venues.description: Live music bar with bands and a DJ, decorated interior, food worth trying. Friendly to both locals and visitors.
venues.source: Google Maps listing 2026-07-11, location confirmed in person

venues.name: Treekoff Watchane
venues.name_lo: ທຣີຄອຟ ວັດຈັນ
venues.area: Khun Bu Lom Rd, opposite Wat Chan
venues.short: Affordable specialty coffee, often a queue
venues.description: Small, popular coffee shop opposite the temple on Khun Bu Lom Road. Affordable, good beans, cozy wooden upstairs that fills fast — expect a queue at peak hours.

venues.name: Tree Town Cafe
venues.short: Photo-friendly decor, bingsu and cotton-candy lattes
venues.description: The photo-spot café — seasonal decor, cotton-candy-topped lattes, beanbags upstairs and well-known bingsu. Tucked in a small soi off Chao Anou. Closed Mondays.

venues.name: Common Grounds Cafe & Bakery
venues.name_lo: ຄອມມອນກຣາວ
venues.short: Brunch café and bakery near the night market
venues.description: Long-running café and bakery on Chao Anou — pita pockets, salads, baked goods and strong coffee, with a small shop inside. A daytime staple near the night market. Closed Sundays.

venues.name: Drip 1920s
venues.description: Retro café styled to the 1920s — gramophone music, vintage decor, drip coffee blends — inside a hostel garden. Unusually for a Vientiane café, it stays open until midnight Thursday to Sunday.

venues.name: MaoMao Matcha Café
venues.name_lo: ເມົາເມົາ ມັດຈະ
venues.description: Compact matcha specialist near That Luang — ceremonial-grade matcha, strawberry daifuku, calm vibe. Closes mid-afternoon, so it's a daytime stop. Closed Saturdays.

venues.name: Vientiane Night Market
venues.name_lo: ຕະຫຼາດກາງຄືນ
venues.description: The nightly riverside market at Chao Anouvong Park — red-tent stalls with clothes, souvenirs and crafts, with street food vendors around the edges. Busiest Friday and Saturday evenings, when street performers often join. A standing anchor of the riverfront night.

venues.name: Night Street
venues.area: Mekong boardwalk, near the King Anouvong statue — exact spot needs confirming
venues.short: Open-air night zone on the riverbank — music, beer and food stalls
venues.description: Open-air nightlife zone on the Mekong boardwalk that took over from the old Cowboy Park — beer and finger-food stalls with a young local crowd, reportedly with free live music on busy nights. No official listing; location approximate.
venues.source: TripAdvisor reports 2026 + boardwalk coordinates estimated — confirm location and schedule in person

venues.name: Farsai Cafe & Restaurant
venues.name_lo: ຟ້າໃສ ຄາເຟ
venues.short: Cafe-restaurant with garden seating, hosts meetups
venues.description: Cafe and restaurant inside the National Library compound with a spacious interior and outdoor garden seating. Fresh, well-priced food — and an occasional venue for community meetups and tech events.

venues.name: Corebeer Brewery
venues.description: Vientiane's craft brewery — kölsch, IPAs and stouts brewed on site, cozy low-lit taproom. Hosts the big Make Friends + language exchange meetup every Thursday evening. The town's best answer to one-more-Beerlao fatigue.

venues.name: Parkson (Naga Mall)
venues.short: Mall — events, food court, cinema crowd
venues.description: The big air-conditioned mall on Khouvieng — shops, food court, kids' zone, and a regular stage for contests and brand events.
